title: Sensodyne Pronamel Medium Toothbrush, Provides Tooth Enamel Protection and Cleans Better with Less Pressure - 4 Count
description: Sensodyne Pronamel Medium Toothbrush is specially designed for tooth enamel care and teeth protection. This medium bristle toothbrush cleans better with less pressure (1). Featuring a DuoFlex neck, this toothbrush is specially designed to protect against overbrushing and prevent enamel loss. This Sensodyne toothbrush pack contains a total of four toothbrushes, giving you plenty to stock your bathroom, travel kit and more with oral care products. It is recommended that toothbrushes are replaced every 3 months. For optimal enamel protection, brush twice daily using a Sensodyne Pronamel toothbrush and toothpaste. (1) In laboratory tests compared to a standard flat-trim toothbrush.
features: Two Packs of 2 Sensodyne Pronamel Tooth Enamel Protection Medium Toothbrush for Sensitive Teeth
Medium toothbrushes for adults offer better cleaning with less pressure (1)
Adult toothbrush features a DuoFlex neck to protect against overbrushing and prevent enamel loss
Convenient manual medium toothbrush pack comes with a total of four toothbrushes to keep you stocked
Manual toothbrush packaging is 100 percent recyclable for easy disposal
Use this tooth enamel toothbrush with Sensodyne toothpaste twice daily

reviews.title: Great for hard brushers
reviews.text: I tend to brush pretty hard and my gums do not appreciate that. These are soft enough that if I get over zealous my gums don't complain but my teeth still get clean.

reviews.title: Feel-Good Brush
reviews.text: I like that it cleans well.  I don't like that the brush bends away from the handle.

reviews.title: Bought for guest bath.
reviews.text: These are for guest bath. Just in case guests forget their toothbrush

reviews.title: Great for me.
reviews.text:
These are great for me! I've gotten better over the years, but I still tend to beat up and flatten toothbrushes by brushing too hard. These might help you to be conscious of that and calm down a little bit, but if you're really bent on brushing too hard, then they'll just give you hand cramps, since now you have to push harder and at an angle. ...hopefully they'll whip you into shape.

Even if you don't have that problem, they're good solid brushes. They seem to last a while and they leave my mouth feeling clean. I like the simpler heads like this, rather than all those weird newfangled things with all the plastic in them.

reviews.title: Nice For Medium Bristles
reviews.text: I like these toothbrushes. I prefer Soft bristles, but sometimes I want a deeper cleaning so the medium bristles are good for that on occasion. The overall design is nice, and I do feel like it keeps you from brushing too hard with the way it can flex and the bristle placement—it’s enough to get your teeth clean and it’s not so harsh and abrasive compared to some other brushes. It’s still a medium brush, so if you’re sensitive, stick with soft.

title: Collis Curve Toothbrushes - Child's Mixed Dentition-Blue Cap
description: Front label panel: Collis Child's Toothbrush Instructions: Use to brush teeth Ingredients: Clinical tests show the curved bristle to be more effective in massaging gums and removing plaque than the conventional straight bristle. Supplemental Facts: Child's mixed dention bluecap

reviews.title: Make a softer brush
reviews.text: It cleans well, the bristles are not soft. I use it for my son with sensory issues. If they could make a brush with soft bristles, I would buy in bulk!

reviews.title: Fraction of the work of normal toothbrushes!
reviews.text: These toothbrushes are great. I have been using the Mentadent (similar type of brush for adults) brushes on my teeth for years and can't find them anymore. I came across these brushes for my autistic child from a therapist. It allows me to brush their teeth in half the time and more precisely than when I try a regular toothbrush. It also helps them learn to brush their teeth with less frustration while hitting more areas of the teeth. Its a great concept and I am really surprised the regular toothbrush manufacturers aren't making these and putting them in stores everywhere.  The downside is the price- I do wish they were cheaper.

title: Ooak Toothbrush, Tapered V++Max Soft Bristles, 4 Pack
description: Ooak 4 pack Standard V++ Max Light - Multiple ColorsTapered V++Max bristles offer a unique design that simultaneously cleans teeth and removes plaque along the gum line. Outer bristles are positioned to gently stimulate gums for an overall healthier mouth. Dental Professional Recommended
features: Ergonomic bristles clean teeth and gums simultaneously
Reduces plaque and cleans the gum line
Tapered bristles
45 Degree Outer Bristles
BPA Free

reviews.title: Huge Brush Head, Might Take Some Getting Used To.
reviews.text: I got these in the mail today and am mixed on them.  For one, I was instructed to do more brushing along the gum line for gum health, so these seem perfect.  I also really like that they are super soft bristles and are pretty gentle on that gum line, however, the brush head is huge and takes a little getting used to.  I have a big mouth and kind of wonder how this would work on a child or petit adult.  I was very happy with the brushing I got and I think I will be using these brushes exclusively in the coming months and will see how they went, once the coronavirus lockdown is over and dentists are back to work.

reviews.title: Very cute
reviews.text:
These were very cute!

I was pleased with these toothbrushes. I think they did a good job at getting my daughter's teeth cleaned. They felt good in her mouth. I thought they worked well.

I have been happy with this brand. We have bought dental products for a long time. They were easy to use. Teeth felt good after it. They last a while. They are a quality product. I would recommend it.

reviews.title: Will Take Getting Used To...
reviews.text: I was interested in trying out these toothbrushes, which I've had recommended to me by a couple of friends.  They're definitely weird in the beginning.  When you're used to a bit of coverage as you brush, having the thin strip down the middle and then on either side is a little odd.  I kept feeling like I had to rotate the brush more, which. might be a good thing?  It seems to clean as well as my normal toothbrush, but it is going to take time to be comfortable with.

reviews.title: Great beginner toothbrush
reviews.text: Great beginner toothbrush! The bristles are really soft so great for someone just getting started. I used one in my almost 5 yr old and the other on my almost 2 year old. Both worked great and were soft enough for them.

reviews.title: Super soft!
reviews.text: I have a niece that hates brushing, and doing so is a pain. The design of this is unique. It has a V shaped head to reach the teeth and gums at the same time. Comes in a pack of 2 so the two will last six months. Has a wider handles for little hands.

title: StarWin Portable UV Toothbrush Sanitizer Travel Case UV-C LED Sterilization and Rechargeable Sterilizer Box Cleaner Holder Fits Most Electric Toothbrush Heads and Manual Toothbrushes (1 Pack)
features: ✅Sterilization Effect 99.9%: Our UV toothbrush sanitizer uses UVC-LED to kill bacteria on your toothbrush to keep your toothbrush clean and maintain good oral health.

✅Built-in Rechargeable Battery: The toothbrush sterilizer case has a built-in rechargeable battery that does not require you to purchase additional batteries. Using the USB-C charging port, it can be fully charged in about 2 hours. A full charge lasts about 15 days.

✅Easy to Use: Put the toothbrush in the toothbrush sanitizer box and close the cover, press the switch to turn on the sterilization for 3 minutes, then the toothbrush cleaner will auto turn off when finished. When sterilization open the cover toothbrush sanitizer UV light auto stop working. Designed with ventilation and drainage port, avoid toothbrushes that become moldy and harbor bacteria in an airtight, humid environment(Shake off the excess water from the toothbrush before putting it in).
✅A Good Gift: The toothbrush sanitizer and holder is made of high-quality ABS material, elegant appearance, using gift box packaging, a good choice for you to give as a gift to relatives and friends.

✅Why StarWin: We sell a wide range of professional high-quality toothbrush sanitizers for home and travel use and offer 2 months free refund and 14 months free replacement, any issues just contact the seller and we will refund or exchange it within 12 hours for you.
✅Safety equipment certified by EPA agencies, EPA Establishment Number: 97846-CHN-1

reviews.title: Nice looking compact carrier
reviews.text: I actually had to send this product back.  The product too too long to switch on, I had to constantly hold the button on for it to come on, half the time I did not know if it was on or not because the light did not come on.  I would have like it if the case stood still but it just kept on rolling over.  I sent it back for a full refund

reviews.title: It is supposed to disinfect!
reviews.text: I did not see a plain verson. And I don't like the one with antenna (that's what it looks like) I think I have already reviewed this.

reviews.title: Not sure if it works
reviews.text: I’m really not sure if this sanitizing feature truly works. But it is a great case for travel. It comes charged as well, it does make me feel better that it has a sanitizing option, but I can’t say for certain it does anything to actually sanitize it.

reviews.title: Finally!
reviews.text: Sanitized toothbrushes, at last! It only takes a couple of minutes. It’s very simple and easy to use. Easy to recharge and easily packs for travel. Good to better!

reviews.title: Keep your toothbrush sanitized
reviews.text: Just place your dry toothbrush in the rechargeable holder and in a few hours or overnight feel confident your using a germ free toothbrush. Works with almost all toothbrushes.

title: 100 Pack Toothbrush Standard Classic Medium Soft Toothbrush Bulk Individually Wrapped
features: INDIVIDUALLY WRAPPED: Each medium soft toothbrush is individually wrapped in a paper casing. Toothbrush Height: 7 Inches. This ensures that the toothbrushes are well protected from germs and bacteria and can be easily redistributed. These manual toothbrushes design with ergonomic shape and grip handle for maximum control while brushing. A great low cost option for everyday use or for those ones and done circumstances.

MEDIUM SOFT BRISTLES: Medium soft toothbrush bristles are made soft to the touch to prevent any damage from being done to the enamel of your teeth when removing plaque. Brush away & feel the difference!

STANDARD SIZE: These medium soft toothbrush are standard sized. They are intended for adults but children can use them as well. Each Pack oral toothbrush comes with a variety of colors so you don’t mistake your brush with your friends or family members. Give your favorite color to your family member or pass this along to a friend when going on adventures.

WHOLESALE TOOTHBRUSHES: There are so many uses for toothbrushes in bulk quantity. Commercially, they can be redistributed in hotels, Airbnb apartments, dental offices, community events, school rooms, to the homeless and the needy, and hygiene drives. They are also great for personal use if you are a frequent traveler, or are in the habit of disposing of your toothbrushes often.

PERFECT TRAVEL TOOTHBRUSH: Our disposable manual toothbrushes pack is perfect for traveling, camping, business trips and those on the go. Use them as little or as long as you’d like and toss them out when you’re done! This makes them extremely convenient for everyday use or buy as wholesale toothbrush for donation.

reviews.title: Love buying quality in bulk!
reviews.text: These toothbrushes are hard bristle though very sturdy! And such a deal for the price for the amount and quality of the item!! It is hard to separate the toothbrushes by hand, deft need scissors. But aside from that one minor drawback, they're perfect!

reviews.title: Great value
reviews.text: Great value, cute packageing. Great for travel or guests.

reviews.title: Nice quality and colors
reviews.text: Bought these to pack in hygiene kits for people in crisis, so they had to be individually wrapped to keep them hygienic and clean. They came in strips of 10 with perforations in between to separate each toothbrush. unfortunately, some of the seals between the toothbrushes split open when I cut them apart. I did not "tear" them apart, I very carefully cut them apart with long scissors, but the seal just wasn't good enough to hold. Maybe 4 out of 50 weren't usable because of this, which is unfortunate as we needed all 50. The price point was so reasonable, though, that this flaw could be forgiven.

reviews.title: Thumbs up
reviews.text: Used these as gifts for goodies bags for our women’s conference.

reviews.title: Good AND bad!!
reviews.text: They work but only lasts for like 3 uses, BUT at this price I like a new brush every 3 uses snyway so thats it! If you are looking for a brush that lasts a month (yuck) this aint it but if you want a fresh brush every couple days go for it.

features: 【SVITOO Baby/Children Toothbrush】Specially designed for babies and children aged 1-6 years. Food grade materials have passed FDA testing. Creative and lovely toothbrush is a gift for children

【10000 Fine Soft Bristles - Soft Rubber Brush Head】the center of the brush head adopts tens of thousands of bristles, which is very soft and dense. It is our unique design, which can better clean the baby's teeth and mouth. The outer soft silicone brush head has the effect of massaging gums

【Safety baffle】The bear shaped block can attract children, prevent the toothbrush from going too deep into the baby's mouth, prevent the brush head from lying flat on the table and keep it clean. This is creative toothbrush

【Easy to Clean】Polymer nanomaterials can reduce bacterial reproduction and are easy to clean. You only need to wash with warm water after use. We recommend changing it once a month is better for your baby. Any questions, feel free to contact us.

reviews.title: Soft for gums and tiny teeth.
reviews.text: Cute little tooth brush for babies to learn with. Not going to hurt gums if they start to chew on it. Can see a two year old learning to brush well after tries as a baby with this safe brush.

reviews.title: Love the design
reviews.text: Its so cute and the bristles are soft so its perfect for a toddler.

reviews.title: Great size...
reviews.text: These toothbrushes are the perfect size for toddlers.  The bristles are soft and the handle is made of a combination of hard plastic and silicone, so it’s easy to grip.  The optional silicone guard is perfect for helping little ones learn how to control the brush.  And, each brush has a suction cup on the end of the handle, so it’s easy to stand them up in the bathroom counter.  My only issue is that one of the brushes got smashed during delivery and the silicone guard is bent inwards...it will probably pop out in time, so really only a minor issue.  Overall, nice infant to toddler toothbrushes!

reviews.title: One of my favorite toddler toothbrushes
reviews.text: I really love how theses have the guards. My nephew has special needs so while he's 8, he physically is like an infant. We are teaching him how to hold a toothbrush and brush his own teeth. This is great because he always puts too much in his mouth and ends up choking. If you have a new leader to brushing teeth this is most definitely will be your saving grace.

title: grabease Double-Sided Toothbrush for Ages 6 Months to 4 Years, Soft Bristles & Choke Protection Shield, BPA-Free, 1 Pack, Yellow
features: INDEPENDENT TOOTHBRUSHING: Introducing our game-changing toothbrush designed for independent toothbrushing in babies, toddlers, and preschool kids aged 6 months to 4 years! With its two-sided design, this toothbrush encourages a positive approach to oral hygiene. The pack includes one double-sided toothbrush that's perfect for little hands, and a silicone finger brush for gentle gum massage. This toddler toothbrush is ideal for a child's first toothbrush, making dental care fun and easy.

DOUBLE-SIDED TOOTHBRUSH: Our toothbrush is designed to give your child a dazzling smile in no time! The innovative, tapered bristles on both sides of this brush offer maximum contact with teeth - perfect for easily-distracted little ones. Plus, a bonus finger toothbrush is included, ideal for infants, and kids experiencing sensory or sensitivity issues. Ensure your child's dental care starts off strong with our versatile brush set.

SOFT BRISTLES & CHOKE PROTECTION: Our patented design ensures a safe, mess-free tooth cleaning experience for both toddlers and parents. With a built-in choke barrier, the Brush prevents over-insertion and gagging. The soft, flexible bristles are gentle on tender gums and new baby teeth. This versatile toothbrush is a must-have for your baby's first dental care kit - perfect for toddlers, first-time brushers, and those transitioning from finger toothbrushes.

EXPERT APPROVED: Specially designed for infants and toddlers, our patented toothbrush has the seal of approval from top pediatric dentists. With endorsements from the American Academy of Pediatric Dentistry, you can trust that our product is perfect for your child's needs. Remember to replace every 3-4 months for optimal oral hygiene. Shop with confidence, as our brushes ensure a safe, effective start to your baby's dental journey. Order spares or stock up now!

CERTIFIED SAFE: Meticulously lab-tested to meet the most stringent USA safety standards for your baby's wellbeing. Our toothbrushes are 100% BPA, lead, and phthalate-free, ensuring your child's safety as they learn proper oral hygiene. Guide your child with our double-sided toothbrush designed specifically for their needs - from their first tooth to confident self-brushing as a toddler. Create healthy habits under your loving supervision with Grabease.

reviews.title: Not a primary toothbrush
reviews.text: It’s hard-to-impossible to clean the front of my 18 month olds teeth with this. It’s too big. I can use a different brush for that, and then give this to him to “play with” for a few minutes. He makes gagging sounds but it is safe, of course; it’s just much bigger than other baby brushes. I’d save for older toddlers and even then it might be hard for fronts of teeth.

reviews.title: Cheaply made

we've been using this for about a few weeks and it looks like we've had it for a year- its frayed pretty bad :(

title: mushie Baby Finger Toothbrush (Tradewinds/Stone) 2-Pack
features: Help brushing go smoothly and begin building good habits with our silicone baby finger toothbrushes.
Designed in Sweden and made of soft, food-grade silicone, they slip onto your fingertip so you can gently clean your baby's teeth without irritating gums.
Hand wash in warm water. Replace every 3-4 months.
Caution: Not a toy. Adult supervision required under 3 years of age. Do not leave a child unattended with this product.

reviews.title: LOVE THESE BABY TOOTHBRUSHES!
reviews.text: I love everything from this brand. Mushie has the best baby silicone products and I wish I had bought the other products from Amazon so that I can write these reviews! I've been skeptical about using the cotton baby toothbrushes because I don't want any lint staying in my baby's mouth or it slipping off and be a potential choking hazard. This silicone toothbrush fits perfectly on my finger and makes it so much easier to brush his teeth rather than using a toothbrush and worrying about scraping the roof of his mouth. It's soft all around and has a silicone brush side to brush and a bumpy side for better gum stimulation. It comes in a pack of two and this brand has various modern colors. I highly recommend this product for infant brushing!

reviews.title: Great Product, easy to use!
reviews.text: My baby girl loved this toothbrush! It made brushing her teeth so easy and she loved it! She had so much fun brushing her teeth!

reviews.title: A little large but overall good
reviews.text: These are a little large for 0-3 months but overall easy use, clean and very soft.

reviews.title: love these

reviews.title: Great toothbrush!
reviews.text: I was given one by my oral surgeon and have since used nothing else. Used properly gives you a clean like you just left the hygienist.

reviews.title: My dentist recommends!
reviews.text: This is the toothbrush my dentist recommends. I really, really like it! I'm very glad to have found it here so I can change it out as often as she wants me to.

reviews.title: Love these toothbrushes

reviews.title: Nothing special, won't buy again
reviews.text:
I could find nothing particularly special about these. They don't clean my teeth better than any other toothbrush thar I have picked up at the grocery store in the past.
Not worth the price. They aren't angled properly to reach the base of my back teeth. Regret getting these vs something like a "Reach" brand that is angled.

reviews.title: Very soft bristles
reviews.text: I always love the Soft toothbrush my dentist gave me.  They changed it so I had to search for different soft toothbrushes for myself.  Found these and it’s definitely very soft bristles.  Highly recommended.  They give you five in package.

title: EcoDent Tooth Powder Daily Care, Baking Soda Tooth Powder, Fluoride Free, Low Abrasion with Baking Soda, Tooth Powder for Toothbrush, Original Mint Tooth Powder (3 Pack-2 Oz Ea)
description:
Eco-Dent DailyCare Mint Toothpowder is made with baking soda, minerals, peppermint oil, and myrrh. It provides an economical way to support your oral health.
The effervescent formula reaches all areas of your mouth to clean deeply and freshen your breath with every use. Easy to apply with your toothbrush, the low abrasion formula protects delicate tooth enamel while delivering the legendary cleaning power of baking soda.
The tooth powder contains no fluoride, SLS, parabens, artificial sweeteners, colors, and is cruelty free and vegan friendly.

I've used this product for many years. Took a few brushes to get used to the salty baking powder taste, but it's been smooth sailing ever since... And no cavities!

Keep in mind, it has no fluoride so if you need fluoride like I do, I mix this with crest for a bright shiny smile.

title: N-amboo Super Hard Toothbrush Bamboo Toothbrush Large Brush Head Manual Toothbrsuh Hard Bristles Pack of 4
description: Super Hard Bristles,More Cleaning Bamboo toothbrush,eco-friendly Large brush head

reviews.title: High quality bamboo toothbrush, worth the money!
reviews.text:
I was looking for a more sustainable toothbrush to replace the plastic ones I've been using forever. I found out about bamboo toothbrushes and I had to try them.

What I really like about these is how big the heads on them are. The wood is nice and smooth and it's easy to hold. I also prefer firm toothbrushes and picked these specifically because they were marked as "super hard" - and they really do live up to the name, because they were actually a little too hard for me. (I suspect I was brushing too hard since I'm used to different types of brushes, so it's just something I have to get used to.) I'm not knocking down the rating on that, though, because they were true to their advertising. :)

Very good brushes. I plan to buy them again.

reviews.title: These are HARD
reviews.text:
UPDATE: these ended up making my tongue bleed quite a bit. Why you’d need this type of brush for your mouth… I have no idea. Can’t return cause I used it. Otherwise I would , so I think I’ll use them for a teeny bonfire.

I will preface this by saying I use an electric oral b cross action toothbrush . I got these to brush my tongue . And the toothbrush is HARD. Like it made my tongue bleed. Idk who is using this for their teeth lol be careful if u are. It worked amazing for the purpose I got it for but just be cautious.

title: Curaprox Soft Toothbrush CS 1560, 6 Pack, Colors May Vary
description: The CS 1560 Soft Toothbrush gently fights plaque and stains with the power of CUREN filaments. With densely packed and incredibly gentle bristles, the CS 1560 provides a deeper clean without damaging your gums. Tough on plaque and delicate on gums, the CS 1560 is designed for optimum oral health. The octagonal handle of the CS 1560 delivers precise manipulation to brush at every angle, with an angled brush head removes stubborn plaque and stains in hard-to-reach places. Enamel erosion and receding gum lines can be caused by vigorous scrubbing and hard brushes. To prevent this kind of damage, switch to a softer bristle like the CS 1560. CUREN bristles are gentler than typical nylon brushes for a healthier smile.
features: BRIGHTER SMILE: Transition to a softer brush and deeper clean with the CS 1560, equipped with 1,560 tightly packed 0.15 mm bristles to fight plaque and stay gentle on enamel and gums.
SOFT BRISTLES: By using CUREN filaments instead of nylon, Curaprox toothbrush bristles are incredibly fine and gentle to prevent enamel erosion.
GENTLE ON GUMS: Harsh brushing and stiff bristles can irritate your gum line. The CS 1560 cleans gently to promote gum and oral health.
ANGLED BRUSH: The angled head allows you to remove stubborn plaque and stains in hard to reach places.
STOCK UP: Available in a pack of 6 to stay stocked up year round for a healthier smile.

reviews.title: No good
reviews.text:
I ordered this for my son, and he loved it so much! He had fun brushing his teeth and did such a good job.
For like 2 weeks.
The battery is not waterproofed, so it is all getting wet every time you brush and rinse. So now it doesn't work. I thought it was just a dead battery, but nope. It all got wet and is ruined.
I'm super disappointed. You would think something like a toothbrush would be better sealed to prevent such a thing from happening. And of course, it died right after the return deadline.
Save yourself the money and drama of explaining to a toddler why he can't use his Blippi brush anymore.

reviews.title: good value

reviews.title: Works as needed.
reviews.text: You get what you pay for. These kids toothbrushes aren’t expensive and what you receive is good value for the money. Yes, some of the toothbrushes get loosened fibers over time, but we don’t keep them long enough to reach that point. The more aggressive of a brusher you are, the quicker you need to replace them. I find that they don’t last 3 months with good consistent brushing, as the quality declines with usage. Overall I’m happy with these for my son, just remember to switch them out within three months. The design is a great bonus for kids that enjoy HotWheels!

reviews.title: Pretty good from someone that is a bit of a skeptic on the benefits of sonic toothbrushes
reviews.text:
Review for: Sparx - Electric Toothbrush, Ultrasonic Toothbrush, Cordless Toothbrush Rechargeable with Light Therapy Technology,

Having tried a couple of different sonic toothbrushes, I have not been impressed with them when compared to a true electric toothbrush. This one though, is much closer to making me a convert. It has much more vibration than others that I have tried and it does feel like it is doing more to clean my teeth. I am not sure if the blue light is really making my teeth whiter but if it is, that is a huge plus.

The brush comes with an extra head, a charger and a set of instructions.

reviews.title: Love this
reviews.text: I’ve been using this all week and really like it. I haven’t had to recharge it. It says it stays charged for 15 hours. I love the 3 different settings (clean, whiten, polish)! My teeth feel cleaner and smoother. It’s a great product!! Highly recommend!

reviews.title: my teeth feels very clean after 1 week of use
reviews.text:
[[VIDEOID:d99e4c11dd05411b9b597ceb102b22f]] Update: For some reason mine stopped turning on even after I fully charged it. However, customer service was excellent! I reached out to them on Amazon and they immediately sent me a replacement which arrived in 2 days. I am very happy with their level of customer service, in addition to this still being one of the best electronic toothbrush I've used. It really just makes my mouth feel so clean, more than the Philips one ever did. The replacement set that I received has one toothbrush head that emits blue light, and one that emits red light. In my previous set there were only blue light heads so I'm happy I finally get to try the red light. I am currently using this with a whitening gel paste from another brand and it works wonderfully. I am waiting for Sparx to come out with toothpaste (fluoride free please!) and whitening paste. Bottom line: great customer service, great product, and still highly recommend Sparx!

I really like this toothbrush and it really makes me want to brush my teeth more frequently. I have to admit I sometimes get lazy to brush my teeth but this one makes me look forward to my night time routine. I already have an electric toothbrush at home but this one caught my eye because of the LED blue light. I just had to get it because I was curious about this feature.

In terms of the brush power, I think it is great. There are different modes - clean, white, polish, and gum care. Each one vibrates in a different manner. I like that the button is big because if I want to change modes mid brush, my thumb can find it easily. I've used other electric toothbrushes where the power button is so small I couldn't really find it with my thumb. The overall design and size of the button, toothbrush head, and body is perfect, at least for me.

This does use a proprietary brush head, which currently comes in a 1 or 2 pack. It is cheaper to get the 2 pack. I am currently using the blue light version. I believe if you want the red light you'll have to purchase a different brush head. The set I got is both blue light brush heads, so there were two replaceable brush heads in the box. I believe some of their other sets comes with one blue and one red. There is a small charging stand which will need to be plugged into an outlet for the toothbrush to charge.

My only confusion with this product is how the blue light works. Will it work with my own toothpaste or does it require Sparx branded toothpaste? Does the light works to whiten teeth regardless if you use toothpaste or not? Is the LED blue light safe to use on skin? That is the only part that I needed more clarification on, and wished there was more information on this Amazon page.

Regardless of my questions, I still think this is a great electric toothbrush with a lot of potential. My teeth feels so clean after use.

reviews.title: Good Sonic Toothbrush, Confusing Instructions on Whitening
reviews.text: This is an expensive sonic toothbrush that has a blue light feature.  As a sonic toothbrush it works well but there are other options out there that are less expensive that don't require specialized replacement heads.  It is nice that this charges using an USB interface so that saves on cords when traveling.  It is generally not clear how the blue light is supposed to help.  Looking up teeth whitening technology it appears you need a special gel for the blue light to activate teeth whitening.  This is not included with the toothbrush nor discussed in the literature that I can find.  Overall, this works well as a sonic toothbrush, but you will need to purchase special teeth whitening gel to gain the benefits of the blue light as I don't really see a difference by itself.

reviews.title: Works great with my sonicare
reviews.text: Works great and a good price . Good purchase, very happy with them

reviews.title: A Great Replacement
reviews.text: I'm not sure which model toothbrush I have, only that it's pretty basic and several years old, but still going strong. These brush heads are a perfect fit and work just like the brand name. I did find these to be a bit larger than the one I replaced, and the bristles were a bit longer, so it just felt bigger in my mouth overall. That being said, the bristles on these are softer and I find them to be gentler on my sensitive gums, even with the bigger brush size. Each brush has a colored dot (4 different colors) to differentiate between them if necessary. Overall, I'm happy with these.

reviews.title: Good affordable ootion
reviews.text: These brush heads are a good replacement option at an amazing price.

reviews.title: Works well for my Philips Sonicare 4100
reviews.text: This 8-pack of replacement brush heads for several Philips sonicare rechargeable toothbrush models fits my Sonicare 4100 perfectly. Popped on smoothly with no weird gaps. These are a larger size compared to the small Phillips diamond head style that I have been using and I've included a photo of a comparison showing this new replacement and the Philips sonicare branded brush side by side. I was worried they wouldn't be soft, but they are and I'm pleased with the bristles. After using for a week, I am glad I tried them and wouldn't hesitate to continue to use these and save some money.

reviews.title: Soft bristles
reviews.text:
I was running low on my Sonicare heads so I decided to give these a try, excited because they are a fraction of the cost of the name brand kind, especially for a package of 8.

They fit the handle just fine, but they aren’t chip-enabled to work with the automatic brush change reminder light on several Sonicare handles. So like regular toothbrushes you have to keep track of when you need to change it again.

I put my old ready-to-be-changed head back on immediately, as these bristles aren’t even close to “medium” hardness. They are SOFT. My old head has much stiffer-bristles than this new one, which I prefer.

I gave it a 2 rating because they do work for my Sonicare brush handle just fine, but they don’t work for me personally. If you need soft for sensitive gums, then these are for you.

You can’t go wrong with the Gum Care setting and these replacement heads if you need soft bristles. For the price, a pack of 8 is a steal!

They just aren’t for me, they are way too soft, I’m bummed.

reviews.title: Works fine
reviews.text: Reasonable

reviews.title: Compact design and long battery life is awesome!
reviews.text: I was looking for an electric toothbrush that I could Use in a small bath. The design is compact and the long battery life is perfect O that I do not have to leave the charger plugged in. I charge it approximately once a month and it works great!

reviews.title: Great toothbrush
reviews.text: Brought it as a Christmas gift and it was a hit. Great price too.

reviews.title: Effective, compact electric toothbrush with no cords to clutter
reviews.text: The charge from my USB port lasts about a week.  There are several settings for speeds and intensity.  It’s a powerful little brush.  You have to get use to the smaller size of the toothbrush head.  Because its smaller, you have to go slower over each section of your mouth but after you’re done teeth feel clean. I would buy this again.
